prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第26名，近年稳定在24–27 名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及13起校园安全与学术不端事件（如浴池偷窃、维权推诿等），对报考心理有 降温作用；抖音热度排名第40位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2025年投档异常信号为「中关注」，江苏物理类法学暴跌2700位、黑龙江临床组下降明显，可能对2026年报考 产生滞后影响；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上共15个：考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、法学A、化学A、数学A、机械工程A、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚 ，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持偏热；土木建筑、生化环 材明显劝退。重庆2026年总考生约20.9万人，按近年比例估算物理类约13.7万人，较2025年（13.95万）略降约1.9%，竞争压力微减；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距重庆较远，地域偏好偏弱；该校在本省（吉林）招生占比约60%以上，在重庆招生占比约0.6%左右，属跨省招生，地域因素对位次影响中性 偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10556名、2026年物理类缩招约6.5%（使位次数字增大）、声誉负面事件降温、考生总数略降等因素，结 合声誉降温小幅修正后，预测2026年物理类最低位次约10196名，区间9696–10696名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10365 → 9352 → 12238 → 9660 → 10556, showing a fluctuating trend. In the recent three years (2023–2025), it oscillated within the 9660–12238 range, with a baseline ranking of about 10556 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category was 130 in 2021 → 126 in 2022 → 120 in 2023 → 107 in 2024 → 108 in 2025 → 101 in 2026, a reduction of about 6.5% in 2026 compared to 2025. The decrease in enrollment slightly eases competition, and the ranking number tends to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranked 26th, stable within the 24–27 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative', involving 13 incidents of campus safety and academic misconduct (such as theft in bathhouses, evasion of rights protection, etc.), which has a cooling effect on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. The abnormal signal for 2025 admissions was 'medium concern', with a sharp drop of 2700 places in Law in Jiangsu's Physics Category and a significant decline in the Clinical Medicine group in Heilongjiang, which may have a lagging effect on 2026 applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 15 disciplines rated A- or above: Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., indicating strong disciplinary strength and attractiveness for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively hot. Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Chongqing is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 137,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 1.9% from 2025 (139,500), slightly reducing competition pressure. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Chongqing, with weak geographical preference. The university enrolls about 60% of its students within its own province (Jilin), while in Chongqing, the enrollment proportion is about 0.6%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with a neutral to weak impact of geographical factors on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10556, the approximately 6.5% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), the cooling effect of negative reputation events, and the slight decrease in total examinees, combined with a minor correction for reputation cooling, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 10196, with a range of 9696–10696.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 10196, with a range of 9696–10696. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (about 9700) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 10200) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Vehicle Engineering. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (about 10700) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Jilin University has a wide range of disciplines, with 15 A-level disciplines, offering ample space for major selection. It is recommended to consider personal interests and employment prospects comprehensively.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1100 → 962 → 1584 → 2607 → 1953, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing, then increasing, then decreasing again. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 2607, then rebounded to 1953 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 650 positions in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category was 10 in 2021 → 13 in 2022 → 18 in 2023 → 25 in 2024 → 25 in 2025 → 32 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan increased by 28%, significantly easing competition and tending to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 26th, having been stable in the 24–27 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving 13 campus safety and academic misconduct incidents, which may cool down application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. The 2025 admission anomaly signal is 'medium concern', with a sharp drop of 2700 positions in Jiangsu's Physics Category Law major potentially indirectly affecting History Category Law applications. Related advantageous disciplines in History Category include Law (A), Archaeology (A+), Marxist Theory (A+), Philosophy (A-), Political Science (A-), etc. Law and Archaeology are top-tier, strongly attracting liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law from 2024 to 2026 is evaluated as 'recommended' to 'differentiated wait-and-see', with basically stable popularity. Chinese Language/Literature is recommended. Teacher Training/Education is in a differentiated wait-and-see state. In 2026, Chongqing has approximately 209,000 total examinees, with an estimated 72,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 1.7% from 2025 (73,400), slightly reducing competition pressure. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Chongqing, with weak geographical preference. Its enrollment in Chongqing's History Category is very small, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with geographical factors having a neutral to weak impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1953, the significant 28% expansion in History Category in 2026 (which notably increases the ranking number), the cooling effect of negative reputation events, and a slight decrease in total examinees, with minor adjustments due to the large expansion but negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2311, with a range of 1964–2658.
